remarks: 1,140SF of 1st Floor Retail Space  Great. light from front windows Asking $25.00 modified gross per month plus utilities  Great for retail, nail salons, hair salons gym, fitness , dance or martial arts.  Position your business in this exceptional retail opportunity in the heart of Norwalk. This beautifully renovated 1,140 SF storefront offers a clean, modern aesthetic with vinyl floors, high ceilings, and central gas heat and air conditioning, creating an inviting and comfortable environment for both customers and staff.   Ideally located near the head of the Norwalk Harbor and Norwalk Green, the property benefits from steady foot traffic, great visibility and a vibrant surrounding community. The area is rich with popular restaurants, lively bars, and art galleries, drawing consistent activity throughout the day and evening.  Enjoy close proximity to the Norwalk River Valley Trail, offering scenic appeal and added pedestrian flow, as well as entertainment and events at the Wall Street Theater.
